detail.point: releaseTarget() throws IllegalStateException on static target sources
detail.checked: Searched entire repo - exception message does not exist. TargetSource.releaseTarget() has empty default implementation. Spring's own code in JdkDynamicAopProxy.java:247 and CglibAopProxy.java:733 guard with !targetSource.isStatic() before calling releaseTarget()

detail.point: getTarget() on non-static target sources may create new bean instances
detail.checked: Verified SpringBootMockResolver.java:51-56 guards with isStatic() and skips non-static sources, confirming this is a valid concern for prototype-scoped beans

detail.checked: Diff shows change from Collectors.toMap() to explicit LinkedHashMap - ordering improvement but not a bug fix
